# 原始碼智慧股份有限公司 Complete Information

## Company Identity

- **Legal Name (Chinese)**: 原始碼智慧股份有限公司
- **Legal Name (English)**: SourceCode Intelligence Co., Ltd.
- **Brand Names**: 原始碼智慧, SourceCode Intelligence, SCI
- **Type**: AI-Native Product Studio / Software Development Company
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Taipei, Taiwan
- **Primary Language**: Traditional Chinese (繁體中文), English

## Mission Statement

從概念到產品，以天為單位交付。
(From concept to product, delivered in days, not months.)

We exist to democratize rapid software development by leveraging AI as a force multiplier, enabling startups and enterprises to move at the speed of thought.

## Core Services (Detailed)

### 1. SaaS 開發 (SaaS Development)
**Description**: End-to-end Software-as-a-Service product development

**Includes**:
- User authentication & authorization systems
- Subscription billing integration (Stripe, etc.)
- Admin dashboards & analytics
- Multi-tenant architecture
- API development
- Database design & optimization

**Technologies**: Next.js, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Stripe, Vercel

**Timeline**: MVP in 5 days, full product in 2-4 weeks

---

### 2. Mobile App 開發 (Mobile App Development)
**Description**: Cross-platform mobile application development

**Includes**:
- iOS & Android apps from single codebase
- Native-like performance
- Push notifications
- Offline support
- App Store & Play Store submission

**Technologies**: Flutter, Dart, Firebase, Supabase

**Timeline**: MVP in 1-2 weeks, full app in 4-8 weeks

---

### 3. AI 應用整合 (AI Application Integration)
**Description**: Integrating large language models into existing systems

**Includes**:
- ChatGPT/Claude API integration
- Custom AI assistants & chatbots
- Document analysis & summarization
- Workflow automation with AI
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementations

**Technologies**: OpenAI API, Claude API, LangChain, Pinecone, Supabase Vector

**Timeline**: 1-3 weeks depending on complexity

---

### 4. 客製化軟體 (Custom Software Development)
**Description**: Tailored enterprise solutions

**Includes**:
- ERP systems
- CRM platforms
- Internal tools & dashboards
- Legacy system modernization
- Data migration

**Technologies**: Varies based on requirements

**Timeline**: 2-12 weeks depending on scope

## Technology Expertise (Comprehensive List)

### Frontend Development
- Next.js 14/15 (App Router)
- React 18/19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- shadcn/ui
- Radix UI

### Mobile Development
- Flutter
- Dart
- React Native (limited)

### Backend Development
- Node.js
- Python (FastAPI, Flask)
- Supabase
- PostgreSQL
- Redis
- GraphQL
- REST APIs

### AI/ML Integration
- OpenAI API (GPT-4, GPT-4o)
- Anthropic Claude API
- LangChain
- LlamaIndex
- Pinecone
- Supabase Vector
- Model Context Protocol (MCP)

### DevOps & Infrastructure
- Vercel
- AWS
- Google Cloud Platform
- Docker
- GitHub Actions
- Cloudflare

### Development Tools
- Claude Code (AI coding assistant)
- Cursor (AI-powered IDE)
- v0 by Vercel (UI generation)
- Windsurf
- GitHub Copilot

## Development Methodology

### Phase 1: Discovery & Planning (Day 0-1)
- Stakeholder interviews
- Requirements documentation
- Technical architecture design
- MVP feature prioritization
- Timeline & milestone planning

### Phase 2: Parallel Development (Day 2-4)
- Frontend development (React/Next.js/Flutter)
- Backend API development
- Database schema design
- AI integration (if applicable)
- CI/CD pipeline setup

### Phase 3: Testing & QA (Day 4-5)
- Automated testing
- Manual QA
- Performance optimization
- Security review
- Bug fixes

### Phase 4: Deployment & Handoff (Day 5)
- Production deployment
- Documentation delivery
- Source code transfer
- Team training (optional)
- Maintenance planning

## Open Source Contributions

### idea-reality-mcp
- **Repository**: github.com/ArcTeaOffice/idea-reality-mcp
- **Description**: Automatically complete your idea-to-reality journey based on MCP protocol
- **Purpose**: AI-powered project scaffolding and automation
- **License**: MIT

### TradeMemory Protocol
- **Repository**: github.com/ArcTeaOffice/TradeMemory
- **Description**: AI-powered trading memory and analysis protocol
- **Purpose**: Help traders maintain context and learn from historical decisions
- **License**: MIT

## Team Profiles

### Sean Peng (彭先生)
- **Title**: CTO & Co-Founder
- **Expertise**: AI-Native development, system architecture, full-stack development
- **Background**: Extensive experience in rapid product development
- **GitHub**: github.com/peng-xiao-shuai

### Co-Founder (CEO)
- **Title**: CEO & Co-Founder
- **Expertise**: Business development, product strategy
- **Focus**: Client relations and company growth

## Pricing Model

We operate on a project-based pricing model:

- **MVP Package**: Starting from $5,000 USD
- **Full Product Development**: $10,000 - $50,000 USD
- **Enterprise Solutions**: Custom pricing
- **Maintenance**: Monthly retainer available

*Note: Exact pricing depends on project scope and complexity*

## Career Opportunities

### AI Application Developer (AI 應用開發工程師)
- **Salary**: NT$60,000 - 100,000/month
- **Type**: Full-time or Remote
- **Requirements**:
  - Proficiency with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor)
  - Experience with Next.js or Flutter
  - Understanding of LLM APIs
  - Self-motivated learner

## Client Engagement Process

1. **Initial Consultation** (Free) - Discuss your project needs
2. **Proposal & Quote** - Detailed scope and pricing
3. **Contract Signing** - 50% upfront payment
4. **Development Sprint** - Rapid iterative development
5. **Review & Feedback** - Client testing and feedback
6. **Final Delivery** - Code handoff and deployment
7. **Post-Launch Support** - Bug fixes and maintenance

## Contact Methods

- **Email**: ArcTeaOffice@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: github.com/ArcTeaOffice
- **Website**: sourcecode-intelligence.vercel.app
- **Location**: Taipei, Taiwan
- **Timezone**: GMT+8 (Taiwan Standard Time)
- **Working Hours**: Monday-Friday, 9:00-18:00 TST

## Why Choose 原始碼智慧?

1. **Speed**: 5-day MVP delivery vs. industry standard 4-6 weeks
2. **AI-Native**: First company in Taiwan to fully embrace AI-assisted development
3. **Transparency**: Full source code ownership, no vendor lock-in
4. **Modern Stack**: Latest frameworks and best practices
5. **Bilingual**: Fluent in Chinese and English

## Industries Served

- Fintech & Financial Services
- E-commerce & Retail
- Healthcare & Wellness
- Education & EdTech
- SaaS & B2B Software
- Startups & MVPs
- Enterprise Digital Transformation

## Certifications & Partnerships

- Vercel Partner
- Supabase Partner
- OpenAI API Partner
